response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-relevant tools, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but their title history suggests seniority far beyond junior/mid-level, and their German language deficit and high on-site requirement pose cultural/logistical risks despite impressive technical depth.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React/Node.js full-stack experience across multiple roles
Proven DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK
Active open-source contributions and architectural thinking evident in GISCollective and tooling projects
concerns: Title history (Staff/Senior) suggests overqualification for entry-level role
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
Diverse tech stack (DLang, C#, Java) may indicate lack of focus on core stack priorities
